evals.prompt: Check my AAPL bear call spread: I sold the $260 call and bought the $270 call for $1.50 credit, expires May 1 2026.
evals.expected_output: A status card showing the zone classification with buffer%, current P&L, loss% of max, and zone-appropriate guidance.

assertions.name: status_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains the formatted status card

assertions.name: zone_classified
assertions.description: Response clearly states one of the five zones

assertions.name: shows_buffer_pct
assertions.description: Response shows the percentage buffer between stock price and short call strike

assertions.name: shows_pnl
assertions.description: Response shows current P&L per contract
